summary: Completed comprehensive regression testing of TrustTrade escrow app - All 4 previously identified critical bugs have been successfully FIXED. Backend APIs working correctly, frontend loading without React hydration errors, currency formatting proper, admin dashboard functional.

minor_fixes_applied.issue: POST request was returning 200 instead of 201 status code
minor_fixes_applied.fix_applied: Added status_code=201 parameter to FastAPI endpoint

passed_tests: ✅ REGRESSION FIX 1: Auth endpoint /api/auth/me now returns 401 for invalid tokens (previously returned 200)
✅ REGRESSION FIX 2: Transaction creation /api/transactions now returns 201 status code (previously returned 200)
✅ REGRESSION FIX 3: Admin disputes endpoint /api/admin/disputes returns proper array format (previously invalid format)
✅ REGRESSION FIX 4: No React hydration errors in table components (previously had <tr>/<span> nesting errors)
Backend API authentication with valid/invalid tokens working correctly
Transaction creation with accurate 2% fee calculation (R100 → R2 fee → R102 total)
Transaction listing with privacy rules enforced (users see only their data)
Delivery confirmation workflow updates payment and release status correctly
Dispute creation and admin management functionality operational
Admin dashboard stats displaying correctly (7 users, 7 transactions, 5 pending, 4 disputes)
Admin can view and manage all users, transactions, and disputes in separate tabs
Privacy rules working: regular users see only their data, admin sees all data
All monetary values properly displayed in South African Rands (R) format throughout UI
Frontend navigation working between dashboard, transactions list, new transaction form
Admin dispute status update controls functional for pending disputes
Frontend loads without console errors or React hydration warnings
Session-based authentication working for both regular users and admin
Mobile-responsive design maintained across all tested pages
Transaction table sorting and display formatting working correctly
